title: JooseMod: Telekinesis + Enchantments
description: Adds telekinesis and 2 xp-based enchantments to Minecraft!
body:
Telekinesis, Experience, & Mastery

Requires Fabric API.

Adds a telekinesis function to Minecraft, making it so that a block is teleported into your inventory when mined (toggle with Right Alt, can be configured). Also adds the Experience Enchantment and the Mastery enchantment, adding more exp to blocks (Experience) / mobs (Mastery). Both enchantments have a level 1 and 2.

Known Issues:

- Chests drop normally (even with telekinesis on)

Recent Changes:

- Blocks with NBT data (ex. shulker boxes) are now supported by Telekinesis; the block will keep its NBT data when mined and put into your inventory - Killing a mob will now give the correct drops, instead of one drop out of all possible drops - Sugar cane will now break like in Vanilla, but will have Telekinesis applied to it if it is enabled (before, it would not drop all of what it should have)
